THE LOCKER ROOM

STADIUM LOCKER DIMENSIONS

Lockers are 76" high; with the addition of the 4" base, total height measures 80". Front elevation with dimensions and widths as shown.

Locker dimensions

80" total height (76" locker body + 4" base). Width at top 24", base 23 3/4".
Compartments: 12" top, 51 ¼" middle, 12 ¾" bottom. Also available 24" W × 24" D, 19" deep.
